name: chase-rescue-debris
description: Rescue-dog mission over the chase disaster scene: descend a ramp INTO the debris valley, look AROUND the debris to find a colored sphere, fire the control panel to announce the find, then climb OUT the far ramp. Mirrors aparekh02/chase (two slopes, three spheres, scattered debris) in the cadenza-api JSON env so the stress/finetune loop can target look-around, in/out navigation, and signal-on-sphere directly.

actions.signal_sphere: Survivor marker located — colored sphere in sight, holding position to flag it.

scene._comment_axes: cadenza forward is -X; robot spawns at origin and heads into negative X. Debris valley spans x in [-9,-4] (same as chase main.py). Spheres + debris match the chase scene layout.

phases.name: descend_in
phases.goal_prompt: walk forward down the ramp into the debris valley, keeping balance on the slope

phases.name: scan_debris
phases.goal_prompt: look around the debris field — sweep left and right to bring a colored sphere into view

reward._comment_judge: ActionJudge canonical for this phase is turn_left (scan) until a sphere enters the FOV cone, then stand. Rewarding the match teaches the look-around behavior.

phases.name: signal_sphere
phases.goal_prompt: a sphere is in view — use the control panel (signal_sphere) to announce the survivor marker while it is visible

reward._comment_signal: signal_correct fires only when the sphere is in FOV at emit time; false_positive penalizes announcing nothing; miss penalizes walking past a visible sphere without signalling.

phases.name: ascend_out
phases.goal_prompt: climb forward up the far ramp and out of the debris valley to the far side

vla_finetune.prompt_template:
[MISSION: {mission_name}] [PHASE {phase_idx}/{n_phases}: {phase_name}]
[GOAL: {goal_prompt}]
[OBS] body_height={body_height:.2f}m roll={roll_deg:+.0f}° pitch={pitch_deg:+.0f}° feet_grounded={feet_grounded} nearest_obstacle={nearest_m:.2f}m pos=({pos_x:+.2f},{pos_y:+.2f})
[ACTION]
